data.description: The Thai military has reported that Cambodian forces have carried out a sustained bombardment using heavy weapons, field artillery, and rocket systems, intensifying the conflict along the border.
French President Emmanuel Macron has stated that France will officially recognize Palestine as a state, marking a shift in the country's stance on the Israeli-Palestinian conflict.

data.title: SIMPPLE Ltd. (NASDAQ: SPPL) regains Nasdaq's compliance with stockholder equity & annual shareholder meeting requirements.
data.description: In Singapore on July 24, 2025, technology provider SIMPPLE Ltd. (NASDAQ: SPPL) disclosed that it is in compliance with Nasdaq Capital Market's minimum stockholders' equity and annual shareholder meeting regulations as per Nasdaq Listing Rules. The notice from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC served to inform SIMPPLE that they have met these requirements. This development indicates positive progress for SIMPPLE in the facilities management sector.
The Nikkei index saw a decline as traders took profits, locking in gains following a strong rally sparked by the US trade deal news.
Intel has issued a warning that it may exit the advanced chip manufacturing sector if market conditions don’t improve, raising concerns over its future role in semiconductor production.
Simple Ltd. has announced that it has fully regained compliance with Nasdaq’s continued listing requirements, resolving prior issues and securing its position on the exchange.
The most active China coking coal contract surged by more than 6%, reaching 1,243 yuan per metric ton, driven by strong market demand.

data.title: AVAX price falls 2.3% to $23.62 despite record 20M daily transactions, showing strong institutional interest.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX is currently priced at $23.62, representing a 2.3% decrease in value over the course of the day. Despite this decline, the currency is experiencing significant institutional adoption, with a record-breaking 20 million daily transactions. This surge in usage indicates a positive trend for AVAX, suggesting potential bullish momentum in the near future.
Vincent Algar, the CEO of Tennant Minerals Ltd, has announced his resignation, marking a significant leadership change at the company.
Airbus has officially opened a new support centre dedicated to commercial aircraft, aiming to enhance maintenance, repair, and operational support for its fleet worldwide.

data.title: GPU-accelerated cuVS by NVIDIA improves vector search for real-time data retrieval, boosting efficiency with new algorithms.
data.description: NVIDIA has unveiled cuVS, bringing GPU-accelerated vector search to streamline indexing and retrieval for AI applications. The update, which includes new algorithms and integrations, is designed to boost performance significantly.
LG Energy Solution has released its financial results for the second quarter of 2025, detailing key metrics and performance highlights for the period.

LG Energy Solution is considering a shift in its North American manufacturing strategy, potentially converting some EV battery production lines to energy storage system (ESS) battery production to meet growing demand.

data.title: Polkadot (DOT) struggles at $3.99 (-3.90%) amidst technical upgrades; $3.32 support stands. Resistance is a key level to monitor.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DOT is currently trading at $3.99 which reflects a decrease of 3.90% for the day. This decline comes as recent technological improvements are in conflict with the overall weakness in the market. Despite this, a crucial support level at $3.32 remains stable, indicating potential for a rebound. However, there is resistance ahead that may pose a challenge for further price increases.
The Singapore stock index declined by 0.8%, settling at 4,238.150 points as investors reacted to broader market trends.
